_meta.name: spiritual-knowledge
_meta.purpose: Spiritual 主题集群知识层（~15 篇，挂现有 intention/meditation category，非独立栏目）
_meta.merge_target: intention/meditation category（2A §二取消独立 /spirituality/{slug} 生产线，spiritual 作为语义维度并入现有栏目）
_meta.caveat: 2A §二第103/123行取消独立 Spiritual Guide 线（F16 翻案：'权威垄断'=竞争逻辑误判），改为 spiritual 主题集群挂现有栏目。与 intention32 功效线区分：intention=功效结果（calm/love/protection 作为目标），spiritual=主题/路径/实践（awakening/growth/journey 作为 process）。与 meditation9 区分：meditation=坐垫技法，spiritual-practices=更广生活实践总览。

differentiation.vs_intention: intention 聚焦功效目标（结果导向），spiritual 聚焦主题/阶段/路径（过程导向）
differentiation.vs_meditation: meditation 是 formal practice 技法，spiritual 集群含 altar/grid/journey/gifts 等非冥想维度
differentiation.vs_third_eye_meditation: third-eye-meditation=冥想技法 how-to；third-eye-opening=spiritual milestone（signs/practices，非技法教学）
differentiation.vs_cleansing_knowledge: cleansing-knowledge=清洁水晶本身的方法；spiritual-cleansing=净化自我/空间的灵性实践
differentiation.vs_intention_protection: intention protection=功效tag/产品属性；spiritual-protection=灵性实践体系（shielding/grounding/warding rituals）

_meta.compliance_baseline: spiritual = reflection framework（自我反思框架），非医疗/非 power claims/非超能力宣称；spiritual-healing/gifts 必须标 reflection framework not medical treatment
_meta.eastern_note_policy: spiritual 是跨传统主题（cross-tradition），eastern_note 标跨传统参照（印度坦特罗/藏传/道家/苏菲/基督教神秘传统），不偏向单一传统，不强行东方化
_meta.data_sources: 通识构建（mindbodygreen/crystalvaults webReader 验证因网络错误失败，基于 well-established 通用 spiritual 知识 + crystal-attributes spiritual tag 12 石种 + meditation 框架参照）
_meta.crystal_source: spiritual tag 12 石种（intention-tag-map.md）: amethyst/jade/labradorite/rainbow-moonstone/clear-quartz/selenite/lapis-lazuli/rainbow-fluorite/kyanite/angelite/herkimer-diamond/prehnite; 按主题补 rose-quartz/citrine/black-tourmaline/smoky-quartz/carnelian
_meta.page_type_taxonomy: guide(流程教学) / list(清单) / overview(总览) / concept(概念) / practice(实践)

mainpages.title: Spiritual Awakening: Signs, Stages & Crystals for Support
mainpages.definition: A spiritual awakening is a shift in awareness where a person begins to question surface-level identity and seek deeper meaning. This guide covers commonly described signs (shifted perception, emotional intensity, questioning old patterns), stages (discontent, purging, opening, integration), and crystals used as gentle companions during the process.

steps: Recognize common signs: heightened sensitivity, shifting values, feeling 'called' to change
Understand the stages: discontent/purge/opening/integration (non-linear, recurs)
Use crystals as mindful anchors — not as causes of awakening
Pair with grounding practices when intensity rises
Integration: embody insights in daily life over time
calculation.example: Signs vary widely; this is a reflection framework, not a diagnosis

faq_seeds: What are the signs of a spiritual awakening?
How long does a spiritual awakening last?
Which crystals support spiritual awakening?
Is spiritual awakening the same as a mental health crisis?
mainpages.eastern_note: 跨传统参照：印度 Kundalini awakening 传统、基督教 mysticism (St. John of the Cross 'dark night')、藏传 Dzogchen natural awareness — 各传统对 awakening 有独立论述，本页 cross-tradition framing 不偏向单一传统

mainpages.title: Spiritual Growth: What It Is & How to Cultivate It
mainpages.definition: Spiritual growth is the ongoing process of deepening self-awareness, compassion, and meaning. Unlike a one-time awakening, growth is incremental and lifelong — built through reflection, practice, and honest self-inquiry. This guide covers what growth looks like and how crystals can anchor intentions along the way.

steps: Self-inquiry: notice patterns and beliefs honestly
Choose a practice (meditation, journaling, nature, service)
Track growth through values alignment, not 'peak experiences'
Use a crystal as a tactile anchor for an intention
Reassess periodically — growth is non-linear
calculation.example: Growth shows in how you respond to difficulty, not in mystical experiences

faq_seeds: What is spiritual growth?
How do I grow spiritually?
What's the difference between spiritual growth and awakening?
Which crystals support spiritual growth?
mainpages.eastern_note: 跨传统参照：道家修真阶梯、佛教 bhavana (修习)、基督教 formation — growth as incremental cultivation 是跨传统共识

mainpages.title: Spiritual Cleansing: Practices to Clear Energy & Space
mainpages.definition: Spiritual cleansing refers to practices intended to clear stagnant energy from the body, mind, or a space — such as smudging, sound, salt baths, and crystal placement. This guide covers common methods and their symbolic framing. Note: this is about cleansing self/space, not about cleaning the crystals themselves.

steps: Smudging: burn sage/palo santo, move smoke with intention
Sound: singing bowl, bell, or chanting to shift atmosphere
Salt bath: soak with sea salt as a symbolic release
Crystal placement: set selenite or black tourmaline at entry points
Frame as ritual of attention — efficacy is subjective
calculation.example: Cleansing is a symbolic/reflective practice, not a literal energy-removal claim

faq_seeds: How do I spiritually cleanse myself?
How do I spiritually cleanse a room?
What is the best crystal for spiritual cleansing?
How often should I do spiritual cleansing?
mainpages.eastern_note: 跨传统参照：美洲原住民 smudging、印度 agnihotra 火供、道家焚香净场、藏传 sang 净烟 — cross-tradition cleansing rituals

mainpages.title: Spiritual Protection: Grounding, Shielding & Crystals
mainpages.definition: Spiritual protection practices — grounding, energetic shielding, boundary-setting, and warding — help sensitive people feel centered in overstimulating environments. This guide covers practical techniques and the crystals commonly used as tactile anchors. Framed as a reflection/boundary practice, not a literal force-field claim.

steps: Grounding: feel feet on floor, slow breath, sense the body
Shielding: visualize a boundary (symbolic, for centered focus)
Boundary-setting: name what you will/won't absorb
Crystal anchor: hold black tourmaline or amethyst as a physical cue
Pair with practical boundaries — not a substitute for them
calculation.example: Protection here = staying centered, not a literal deflection of harm

faq_seeds: How do I protect myself spiritually?
What is the best crystal for spiritual protection?
What is energetic shielding?
How do I stay grounded around difficult people?
mainpages.eastern_note: 跨传统参照：道家护身符/罡步、藏传防护修法 (srung ba)、基督教 'armor of God' (Ephesians 6)、巫术 warding — cross-tradition protection symbolism

mainpages.title: The Spiritual Journey: Stages, Milestones & Crystals
mainpages.definition: A spiritual journey is the long-arc path of seeking meaning across a lifetime. This guide frames it through universal stages — calling, departure, trial, return (after the hero's journey pattern) — and suggests crystals as companions at different phases. The journey is personal; crystals are anchors, not maps.

steps: Calling: a felt sense that 'there is more'
Departure: leaving old certainties behind
Trial/descent: confronting shadow, doubt, discomfort
Opening: integrating insight
Return: living the journey in ordinary life
calculation.example: The journey is non-linear; stages recur in spirals, not a straight line

faq_seeds: What is a spiritual journey?
How do I start my spiritual journey?
What are the stages of the spiritual journey?
Which crystals for a spiritual journey?
mainpages.eastern_note: 跨传统参照：Campbell hero's journey (普世模式)、佛教菩萨道阶梯、苏菲 tariqa (道路)、道家修行次第 — journey-as-path 是跨传统母题

mainpages.title: How to Build a Crystal Altar: A Simple Guide
mainpages.definition: A crystal altar is a small dedicated space where you arrange crystals (and optionally candles, plants, meaningful objects) as a focus for intention, reflection, or meditation. This guide covers how to build one simply — no doctrine required. The altar is a personal anchor, not a sacred requirement.

steps: Choose a quiet, visible spot (shelf, corner, tray)
Pick a center crystal (e.g. selenite tower or clear quartz point)
Add 3-5 supporting crystals by intention
Optional: candle, plant, photo, journal
Use it: sit briefly daily, or pause when passing
calculation.example: Size and formality don't matter — consistency of attention does

faq_seeds: How do I make a crystal altar?
What should I put on a crystal altar?
Where should a crystal altar go?
Do I need a crystal altar?
mainpages.eastern_note: 跨传统参照：印度 puja 祭坛、藏传供桌、道家神台、神道 kamidana — altar-as-focused-space 是跨传统共识，本页 secular-friendly framing

mainpages.title: How to Make a Crystal Grid: Patterns & Steps
mainpages.definition: A crystal grid arranges multiple crystals in a geometric pattern (often sacred geometry like the Flower of Life) around a central stone, focusing an intention. This guide covers the steps: choosing a pattern, selecting a center stone, placing supporting stones, and activating the grid. Framed as an intention-anchoring practice.

steps: Set a clear intention in one sentence
Choose a geometry (Flower of Life, Seed of Life, simple circle)
Place the center stone (often a clear quartz point)
Place 4-8 supporting stones at points of the pattern
Optionally "activate" by tracing lines with a point — symbolic
Leave the grid up for a set period; revisit the intention
calculation.example: A simple 6-stone circle is as valid as a 30-stone Flower of Life

faq_seeds: How do I make a crystal grid?
What is the best pattern for a crystal grid?
Which crystal goes in the center of a grid?
How long should I leave a crystal grid up?
mainpages.eastern_note: 跨传统参照：sacred geometry 源自毕达哥拉斯/印度 Sri Yantra；藏传 mandala 是 grid 的同构表达 — geometric arrangement as focus 是跨传统的

mainpages.title: 7 Must-Have Spiritual Crystals & Their Uses
mainpages.definition: A curated list of seven crystals widely regarded as foundational for spiritual practice — what each is used for and how to work with it. Intended as a starter set, not a definitive ranking. Each stone is a reflective companion, not a tool that 'does' spirituality to you.

steps: Clear Quartz — master clarifier; intention-setting
Amethyst — calm focus; meditation companion
Selenite — cleansing; clearing space
Labradorite — intuition; navigating change
Lapis Lazuli — truth-seeking; third-eye work
Rose Quartz — heart/compassion; emotional grounding
Black Tourmaline — grounding/protection boundary
calculation.example: Start with 1-3 that resonate; you don't need all seven at once

faq_seeds: Which crystals are best for spiritual practice?
What crystals should a beginner start with?
How do I use spiritual crystals?
Do I need all seven spiritual crystals?
mainpages.eastern_note: 清单综合跨传统共识（clear quartz/amethyst/selenite 几乎出现于所有传统的水晶清单）；lapis 是古埃及/佛教经典灵性石 — 清单本身 cross-tradition

mainpages.title: Third Eye Opening: Signs, Practices & Crystals
mainpages.definition: 'Third eye opening' refers to a heightened state of intuition or inner awareness associated with the ajna center (between the brows). This guide covers commonly described signs (vivid perception, intuitive hits, pressure at brow), reflective practices, and crystals used as anchors. Framed as a reflection framework, not a literal organ 'opening'. Note: for the meditation technique, see our Third Eye Meditation guide.

steps: Understand the ajna concept (tantric origin; symbolic, not anatomical)
Recognize signs: clearer intuition, vivid inner imagery, brow-area sensation
Reflective practice: journaling on intuition vs projection
Grounding is essential — do not force or chase openings
Pair with amethyst/lapis as anchors; not as causes
calculation.example: An 'opening' is subjective; balance it with grounding, not pursuit

faq_seeds: How do I know if my third eye is opening?
Is third eye opening safe?
Which crystals open the third eye?
What does third eye pressure mean?
mainpages.eastern_note: 印度坦特罗：ajna 脉轮；藏传 Dzogchen/六法有相应修法；本页强调 cross-tradition + reflection framing，非超能力宣称

mainpages.title: How to Raise Your Vibration: Practices & Crystals
mainpages.definition: 'Raising your vibration' is a popular metaphor for cultivating emotional and mental states aligned with gratitude, clarity, and compassion. This guide covers practical habits (gratitude, nature, movement, boundaries) and crystals used as tactile cues. The 'vibration' framing is metaphorical, not a literal measurable frequency.

steps: Gratitude practice: name 3 things daily
Nature time: 10-20 min outdoors
Movement: walk, stretch, dance — shift state through body
Media boundaries: reduce doomscrolling
Crystal cue: hold clear quartz or citrine as a pattern-interrupt
calculation.example: Vibration = felt emotional baseline; raised through mundane habits, not hacks

faq_seeds: How do I raise my vibration?
What does it mean to raise your vibration?
Which crystals raise your vibration?
How long does it take to raise your vibration?
mainpages.eastern_note: 跨传统参照：道家 '清气/浊气'、印度 sattva guna (清净之德)、现代 New Age 'frequency' 隐喻 — vibration 是跨传统的现代综合语，reflection framing

mainpages.title: Spiritual Meaning of Stones: Why Crystals Matter
mainpages.definition: This guide explores why humans across cultures have assigned spiritual meaning to stones — from symbolic resonance and color psychology to personal association. It frames crystal meaning as a layered mix of tradition, perception, and personal relationship — not as intrinsic, objective properties.

steps: Historical/cultural: stones in lore across traditions
Symbolic: color, shape, origin as association triggers
Personal: meaning built through your own relationship
Tradition-informed but not tradition-bound
Crystals as mirrors — meaning is co-created, not extracted
calculation.example: A stone's meaning is part tradition, part you — neither alone

faq_seeds: What is the spiritual meaning of stones?
How do crystals get their meanings?
Do crystals have intrinsic spiritual properties?
How do I find the meaning of a stone?
mainpages.eastern_note: 跨传统参照：古埃及/希腊 lapidaries、中国玉石文化、印度 Navaratna 九宝、美洲原住民 stone people — stone-as-meaning 是跨文明共识

mainpages.title: Spiritual Healing: A Reflection Framework (Not Medical Care)
mainpages.definition: Spiritual healing refers to practices that support a sense of wholeness, meaning, and inner peace — complementary to (not a replacement for) medical or psychological care. This guide covers what it can and cannot offer, common practices, and crystals as anchors. If you have a health condition, consult a licensed professional.

steps: Define scope: meaning-making and comfort, not treatment
Common practices: meditation, ritual, nature, journaling
Crystals as tactile anchors for reflection
Red flag: any practice claiming to cure disease
Integrate with — never replace — medical care
calculation.example: Spiritual healing addresses meaning; medicine addresses disease — both have their scope

faq_seeds: What is spiritual healing?
Can crystals heal you?
Is spiritual healing the same as energy healing?
Can spiritual healing replace medicine?
mainpages.eastern_note: 跨传统参照：佛教慈悲疗愈、基督教按手祈祷、道家祝由、藏传 gSo-ba rig-pa — healing-as-meaning 是跨传统的；本页严守 reflection framework not medical treatment

mainpages.title: Spiritual Practices: 12 Ways to Cultivate Daily Awareness
mainpages.definition: A broad overview of spiritual practices across traditions — meditation, prayer, journaling, nature time, service, movement, ritual, creative expression, silence, gratitude, fasting, study. This guide helps you sample and choose what fits your life. Practices are containers for attention; the practice doesn't matter as much as the consistency.

steps: Meditation (see our meditation guides)
Journaling / self-inquiry
Nature time / mindful walking
Service / generosity
Movement: yoga, tai chi, walking
Ritual / seasonal observance
Creative expression
Gratitude practice
Silence / solitude
Sacred reading / study
Breath practice
Choose 1-2 to start; rotate over time
calculation.example: Consistency with one practice beats dabbling in twelve

faq_seeds: What are some daily spiritual practices?
How do I start a spiritual practice?
Which spiritual practice is best for beginners?
How long should I practice daily?
mainpages.eastern_note: 跨传统总览：佛教八正道/禅修、基督教 hours of prayer、苏菲 dhikr、道家早晚课、瑜伽 astanga — cross-tradition practices overview，不偏向单一传统

mainpages.title: Spiritual Gifts: A Reflection Framework (Not Superpowers)
mainpages.definition: 'Spiritual gifts' — intuition, empathy, deep listening, pattern-seeing, compassion — are capacities for perception and relation that some people develop more than others. This guide frames them as ordinary human capacities honed by attention, not as supernatural powers. A reflection framework, not a claim of paranormal ability.

steps: Intuition: pattern-recognition honed by attention
Empathy: felt sensitivity to others' states
Deep listening: presence without fixing
Pattern-seeing: connecting meaning across experiences
Compassion: response without overwhelm
Each gift has a shadow (e.g. empathy without boundaries = depletion)
calculation.example: Gifts are capacities to steward, not powers to chase

faq_seeds: What are spiritual gifts?
How do I know my spiritual gifts?
Is intuition a spiritual gift?
Can crystals develop spiritual gifts?
mainpages.eastern_note: 跨传统参照：基督教 charismata (圣灵恩赐)、佛教 '波罗蜜'、印度 siddhi (神通，佛教/瑜伽警告勿追逐)、道家神通 — gifts-as-capacity framing 跨传统，明确 anti-superpower claim

mainpages.title: Spiritual Alignment: What It Means & How to Find It
mainpages.definition: Spiritual alignment is the felt sense that your actions, values, and attention point in a coherent direction. This guide covers what alignment feels like (congruence, less internal friction), how to sense misalignment (drain, dissonance), and practices to realign. Crystals serve as tactile anchors for the check-in, not as correctors.

steps: Notice congruence: do actions match stated values?
Notice friction: where does energy drain?
Practice honest self-inquiry (journaling, silence)
Adjust one thing — alignment is iterative
Use selenite/clear quartz as a check-in cue
calculation.example: Alignment is a felt direction, not a fixed destination

faq_seeds: What is spiritual alignment?
How do I know if I'm spiritually aligned?
How do I realign spiritually?
Which crystals help with spiritual alignment?
mainpages.eastern_note: 跨传统参照：道家 '道法自然'/天人相应、印度 dharma (正法/本分)、希腊 stoic 'live according to nature' — alignment-as-congruence 是跨传统的
